creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
textproc/libutf8proc has only one depend port (netsurf). So it is logical we change something with this
port. 
It has no maintainer.
So if we (or I) change something, maybe we had also change something in www/netsurf.

I have tried to change the path for libutf8proc.so* to /usr/local/share. But found no way in the moment that netsurf find the library. It uses the "wrong" the libutfproc. I will look further if I find a
way. If you have any suggestion, please tell me.
